ranking.readme_summary: bitnet.cpp ![License: MIT](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT) !version Try it out via this demo, or build and run it on your own CPU or GPU. bitnet.cpp is the official inference framework for 1-bit LLMs (e.g., BitNet b1.58). It offers a suite of optimized kernels, that support **fast** and **lossless** inference of 1.58-bit models on CPU and GPU (NPU support will coming next)

It offers a suite of optimized kernels, that support **fast** and **lossless** inference of 1.58-bit models on CPU and GPU (NPU support will coming next)

ranking.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
ranking.description_ja: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
ranking.readme_summary: Superpowers Superpowers is a complete software development workflow for your coding agents, built on top of a set of composable "skills" and some initial instructions that make sure your agent uses them. How it works It starts from the moment you fire up your coding agent. As soon as it sees that you're building something, it *doesn't* just jump into trying to write code
ranking.readme_summary_ja: Superpowers Superpowers is a complete software development workflow for your coding agents, built on top of a set of composable "skills" and some initial instructions that make sure your agent uses them. How it works It starts from the moment you fire up your coding agent. As soon as it sees that you're building something, it *doesn't* just jump into trying to write code

ranking.description: A collective list of free APIs
ranking.description_ja: A collective list of free APIs
ranking.readme_summary: Try Public APIs for free The Public APIs repository is manually curated by community members like you and folks working at APILayer. It includes an extensive list of public APIs from many domains that you can use for your own products. Consider it a treasure trove of APIs well-managed by the community over the years

ranking.readme_summary: Dolt is Git for Data! Dolt is a SQL database that you can fork, clone, branch, merge, push and pull just like a Git repository. Connect to Dolt just like any MySQL database to read or modify schema and data. Version control functionality is exposed in SQL via system tables, functions, and procedures

Connect to Dolt just like any MySQL database to read or modify schema and data. Version control functionality is exposed in SQL via system tables, functions, and procedures

ranking.readme_summary: A2UI: Agent-to-User Interface A2UI is an open-source project, complete with a format optimized for representing updatable agent-generated UIs and an initial set of renderers, that allows agents to generate or populate rich user interfaces. *A gallery of A2UI rendered cards, showing a variety of UI compositions that A2UI can achieve.* ⚠️ Status: Early stage public preview > **Note:** A2UI is currently ...
